name: metadata_custom_paths
description: metadata.json redirects both the database and JSONL export to non-default filenames inside .beads.
source_hint: Extends the metadata override coverage already present in tests/e2e_env_overrides.rs and src/config/mod.rs.
notes: This is the corpus entry for non-default path discovery rather than corruption.
Future non-hermetic and env-sensitive tests can layer ambient env on top of this fixture.
